issue: Backend Laravel task still pulls 7 rules including haus.react19-patterns and haus.tailwind-scss-patterns. PR2 dropped tanstack/storybook/radix/playwright via requiresAny, but the React+Tailwind frontend rules still surface for a backend-only task because the task router has no ecosystem-isolation filter.
expected: "add queue job" should narrow to haus.laravel-patterns (and optionally phpunit-patterns only when task references testing).
rootCauseHypothesis: Mixed-ecosystem repo with no task->ecosystem mapping. Task tokens 'queue' and 'job' do not match any rule id/reason, so the fallback returns the full medium/high set across both ecosystems.
resolvedByTest: tests/cross-bleed.test.js (laravel-with-react-frontend / add queue job rejects frontend rules)
